entries.title: Ephraim the Syrian on Genesis 48
entries.excerpt: “And it was told Joseph: Behold, thy father is sick: and he took his two sons” (Gen 48:1) and brought them to Jacob, that they might receive his blessing before his death. “And Jacob said: God Almighty appeared unto me at Luz… when I slept with a stone for my pillow, and blessed me. And he said unto me: Behold… I will make of thee a multitude of nations (that is, into tribes). And now Ephraim and Manasseh, even as Reuben and Simeon, shall be mine. And the sons whom thou begettest after them shall be called by the names of the tribes of Ephraim and Manasseh” (Gen 48:3–6).…
